form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start made ground from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Albany Cl2 on March 19 over 1500m, slow going 2 len behind Tousled Crown carrying 59kg at $6.50. The run before that scored a big 4 len win at Esperance Mdn March 1 over 1400m defeating Nanarup with 58kg at $1.90. Hard to knock on his recent form and he can go one better again today.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at this track Cl2 October 19 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Monty Zoomer carrying 58.5kg at $12. Previously first up; third of 9 at this track Cl1 April 5 2025 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Dream Brook with 60kg at $8. Should be right about the mark again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months eased back early on 7th of 9 at this track Cl2 on April 3 over 1300m, 5 len behind Gibraltar Gold with 58kg at $13. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Morphettville 3yo Bm66 on May 31 over 1533m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Tropical House carrying 57.5kg at $20. He's better than he showed fresh and an improved run is on the cards.
